name: SeNorge - Climate, Snow and Hydrology Maps
dataType: gridded temperature, precipitation, snow water equivalent, snow depth, runoff, frost depth
description: Daily gridded maps of snow, water, weather and climate conditions across Norway at 1 km resolution, dating back to 1957 with 9-day forecasts.

name: NVE Atlas - Flood Zones, Glaciers and Energy
operator: Norwegian Water Resources and Energy Directorate (NVE)
dataType: flood inundation maps, glacier inventories, ice thickness, avalanche zones, landslide hazard zones
description: NVE thematic atlas providing flood inundation zones, glacier extent and ice thickness inventories, avalanche and landslide hazard maps for Norway.

name: Geonorge N50 Topographic and AR5 Land Cover Data
dataType: N50 topographic vector data, AR5 land resource classification, DTM 1m/10m, administrative boundaries
description: Geonorge download portal for Norwegian topographic datasets including N50 vector data, AR5 land cover classification and national DTMs at 1-10 m resolution.

name: Kartverket APIs and Open Data Services
dataType: place names, sea charts, tidal data, GNSS/CORS positioning, historical maps, property boundaries
description: Kartverket API hub providing access to place names, nautical charts, tidal predictions, GNSS positioning, historical maps and cadastral data for Norway.

name: Naturbase - Norwegian Nature and Biodiversity Map
dataType: nature types, protected areas, species observations, outdoor recreation areas, marine habitats
description: Map-based database of Norwegian nature types, protected areas and outdoor recreation areas with biodiversity valuations maintained by the Norwegian Environment Agency.

name: SMHI Open Data - Meteorological and Hydrological Observations
dataType: temperature, precipitation, wind, pressure, humidity, solar radiation, river discharge, lake water levels, PTHBV gridded climate
description: SMHI open data API serving Swedish meteorological observations, hydrological measurements, oceanographic data and gridded climate fields from 1961 onward.

name: Lantmäteriet Geodata Products - DEM, Ortho and Topography
operator: Lantmäteriet (Swedish Mapping, Cadastral and Land Registration Authority)
dataType: national DEM (1-2 m from LiDAR), orthophotos (0.25-0.5 m), topographic map 1:50000, property boundaries, place names
description: Lantmäteriet product catalogue providing LiDAR-derived DEMs at 1-2 m, nationwide 0.5 m orthophotos, topographic vector data and cadastral boundaries via STAC and WMTS APIs.

name: FMI Open Data WFS - Weather Radar and Gridded Forecasts
dataType: weather radar composites (reflectivity, rain rate, accumulation), gridded forecasts, lightning, surface observations WFS stored queries
description: FMI WFS-based open data service providing real-time weather radar composites, stored queries for observations and forecasts, and gridded climate fields for Finland.

name: SYKE Open Environmental Data (Finnish Environment Institute)
dataType: land cover (CORINE Finland), water quality, watershed boundaries, protected areas, built environment, Baltic Sea data
description: Downloadable spatial datasets from SYKE covering Finnish land cover, water resources, watersheds, protected areas and environmental monitoring data.

name: Datafordeler - Danish Public Data Distributor
dataType: cadastral parcels, addresses, buildings, elevation model, orthophotos, administrative boundaries, road network
description: Central Danish data distribution platform providing authoritative geodata including cadastre, addresses, buildings, elevation models and orthophotos via REST services.

name: GEUS Jupiter - Danish National Borehole Database
operator: De Nationale Geologiske Undersøgelser for Danmark og Grønland (GEUS)
dataType: borehole lithology, groundwater chemistry, drinking water quality, geotechnical data, raw materials
description: Denmark's national borehole database with over 260000 entries covering 125 years of drilling data including lithology, groundwater chemistry and geotechnical records.

name: MiljøGIS - Danish Environmental Maps
dataType: Natura 2000 sites, water plans, nitrate vulnerable zones, pesticide action areas, nature protection
description: Danish Ministry of Environment map portal for environmental planning data including Natura 2000 sites, water framework directive plans and nature protection zones.

name: ÍSOR Iceland GeoSurvey - Geothermal Data
dataType: geothermal resource assessments, borehole logs, geochemistry, geophysical surveys, reservoir models
description: Iceland GeoSurvey providing geothermal resource data, borehole geochemistry and geophysical exploration results for Icelandic high- and low-temperature geothermal fields.

name: Náttúrufræðistofnun - Icelandic Natural History Data
operator: Náttúrufræðistofnun Íslands (Natural Science Institute of Iceland)
dataType: species distributions, habitat type maps, geological mapping, vegetation classification, protected natural features
description: Geospatial data from the Icelandic Natural Science Institute covering species distributions, habitat mapping, vegetation classification and geological surveys.

name: xgeo.no - Norwegian Geohazard and Climate Monitoring
operator: NVE / MET Norway / Norges vassdrags- og energidirektorat
dataType: real-time snow, soil moisture, ground frost, flood risk, landslide warnings, avalanche conditions, weather station data
description: Expert monitoring tool combining gridded model data with station observations for real-time assessment of flood, landslide and avalanche hazards across Norway.
